config.google_workspace.readonly_hint: När aktiv tillåts bara läsoperationer (ingen e-postsändning, skapande av händelser, dokumentredigering osv.)
config.google_workspace.oauth_desc: Google Workspace uses OAuth2 for authentication. Create an OAuth2 client in the Google Cloud Console, set the redirect URI to your AuraGo URL + /api/oauth/callback, and paste the credentials below.
config.google_workspace.client_id_hint: From Google Cloud Console → APIs & Services → Credentials
config.google_workspace.client_secret_hi: Stored encrypted in the vault. Paste the secret and click Save.
config.google_workspace.scopes_desc: Select which Google services the agent may access. Changes take effect on the next OAuth2 authorization.
config.google_workspace.scope_calendar_w: Skapa, uppdatera och ta bort kalenderhändelser
config.google_workspace.scope_drive_hint: Visa och ladda ner filer från Google Drive
config.google_workspace.secret_save_fail: Det gick inte att spara klienthemligheten
config.google_workspace.oauth_not_connec: Not connected — click Connect to authorize
config.google_workspace.oauth_manual_tit: Browser redirect failed? Paste the URL here
config.google_workspace.oauth_manual_hin: If your browser shows ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED, copy the full address bar URL and paste it below to complete the authorization.
